ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score for the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score for the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance at home games */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., LW, D, C) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "shoots_catches" TEXT /* Player's shooting and catching preference */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's handedness */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., forward, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  "division_champion" TEXT /* Current division champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, penalty, face-off) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game (1, 2, 3, OT) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event (e.g., 12:34) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location on the ice where the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "assistant_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_assistant_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., player, game) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
